ksa_text: Skill in designing data analysis structures and developing data models, including semantic modeling, dimensional design, and organizing data elements to support efficient analytical workflows.

Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the VP Data Products. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (vp).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.406). External validation of this skill KSA for the VP Data Products role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the VP Data Products is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA is within scope for the VP Data Products at the vp tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
